title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nerolac Select Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nerolac Select Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nerolac Select Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nerolac Select Capital India:
Nerolac Select Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
